About the Artist

The Artist Behind the Brush

Meet Gifty Ama Arhin — a passionate makeup artist based in Accra, Ghana, dedicated to bringing out the most radiant version of every woman she works with.

As a Level 300 Information Technology student at Regent University College of Science & Technology, Gifty blends her love of creativity with technical precision — ensuring every look is not just beautiful, but meticulously crafted.

Black Butterfly Beauty is born from the belief that every woman deserves to feel transformed, confident, and absolutely stunning.
